emails.subject: Re: Enron Global Assets Board Slates
emails.body: I am ok with your slate, but need some Houston people on board as well. I think we can shorten the Houston list by taking me off since John Novak will be on the board. I leave it to Bruce to see if it makes sense to shorten the list further. Mark Orlando Gonzalez@ENRON 03/27/2001 01:51 PM
